title: Noctis Weapons
description: A weapons mod that intends to bring back the mystical and whimsical world of the old days.
body:
#  Noctis Weapons: Bringing Back Mythical Weapons

Noctis is a weapons and decor mod dedicated to an exploration of the mythical and divine of our past.

Craft insanely powerful alloys and brand new weapons capable of channeling the powers of the gods.

Are you more inclined to go on the defensive? With a large variety of new decor blocks, you can make the darkest palaces of the underworld, the highest throne rooms of Olympus, or even the extravagant halls of Vallhalla itself!

Join us in this journey of legend.

## _Added_

Celestial Bronze and associated Blocks

Stygian Iron and associated Blocks

Lunaeum and associated Blocks

Amethyst block variants and associated Blocks

Prismarine block variants and associated Blocks

Chronite ore, item, and block

Lunaeum Geodes and related blocks

Celestial Bronze toolset and armorset

Tidal Trident (Semi Functional)

Multiple items for future alloy and weapons implementation

Scythes

## _To-Do_

Port to 1.21.1
